summary: Critical: workflow references ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 which is missing. Task explicitly requires TDD with Pester tests, but none are provided. Workflow will fail at 'Run unit tests' step when executed with act. Script quality is solid (proper error handling, clear structure, $ErrorActionPreference='Stop') but untested. MaxTotalSizeBytes policy (lines 75-85) logic is complex and requires test coverage. Not shippable without test file.
